title: Sentinel Platform Event (Phoenix M1 stub)
description: Stub mirror of sentinel-platform's M0 shared event schema (`/schemas/event.schema.json`). Phoenix's M1 services (provisioning simulator, chaos engine) publish every lifecycle and fault transition in this shape so M2's agent and M3's dashboard have a stable contract to build against. THIS IS A STUB: once sentinel-platform/schemas/event.schema.json lands, this file should be deleted and Phoenix should depend on that one directly — field names and enums here are expected to converge, not diverge.

source_agent.description: Which Sentinel agent emitted this event.

component.description: The resource, service, or subsystem this event is about, e.g. `sim.volume`, `sim.instance`, `chaos.scenario`.

causality.description: Optional causal link to the event/scenario that triggered this one — lets M2 reconstruct "X failed because Y" chains.

caused_by.description: event_id or scenario_id of the upstream cause, if any.

payload.description: Event-specific structured data, e.g. resource id/state for lifecycle events, fault rule + target for fault events.
